entity.summary: Sui-based decentralized exchange focused on concentrated liquidity, dynamic fees, swap routing, liquidity provision, and participation-driven pool incentives.
entity.notes: HEI consolidates duplicate Full Sail discovery rows into one Sui DEX entity. Current first-party website and documentation describe active trading, swap aggregation, concentrated-liquidity pools, dynamic fees, and liquidity management functions.

evidence.title: Full Sail official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website identifies Full Sail as a decentralized exchange on Sui and exposes trading, liquidity, dynamic-fee, and pool-participation features.

evidence.title: Full Sail Trading documentation
evidence.notes: First-party trading documentation provides current swap execution steps, route review, slippage controls, and an aggregator mode that sources liquidity across multiple DEXs.

evidence.title: Full Sail Liquidity documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party liquidity documentation describes concentrated-liquidity positions, custom price ranges, liquidity management, withdrawals, rebalancing, and earning modes.
